name: Will I get pain and suffering money for job forklift injury?
description: Only via third-party lawsuit, not comp.

mainEntity.name: Will I get pain and suffering money for job forklift injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: Only via third-party lawsuit, not comp.
acceptedAnswer.description: Not from workers' comp; yes from third-party negligence suits.[1] Context: Adds big value. Key factors: Clear fault by others. Practical guidance: Pursue if applicable; attorney evaluates. Comp limits otherwise.
